title: system tests: artifact test issues
body:
The newly added system tests for artifacts seem to be somewhat incorrectly done.

We see to have 702-artifact-created.bats and 701-artifact-created.bats which carry the same duplicated test.

The test files have a `skip_if_remote "artifacts are not remote"` which is imply not true the remote artifact support has been merged for a while now.

700-artifact.bats has a name conflict with 700-play.bats, the numbers are supposed to be unique so that local dev can easily filter on them. Ideally there is no need for three three artifact tests files anyway and they should all be just combined.

And 700-artifact.bats is missing artifact cleanup as the default basic_teardown function does not remove artifacts
